name: dodexacode
description: AI-native Swift shell and MCP server with typed primitives, workspace context, and scoped security review tooling.

interface.shortDescription: Swift shell and MCP runtime for humans and AI systems.
interface.longDescription: DodexaCode packages the DodexaBash runtime: a clean-room Swift shell with typed future-shell primitives, compact workspace briefing, structured MCP tools, and policy-gated security review workflows.
defaultPrompt: Brief this workspace and suggest the next steps.
Run a command through dodexabash and return structured output.
Review a target with passive security mode and show mirror defenses.
